log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Tortle — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Tortle — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:11+3=14 vs AC 18] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Tortle — Winged Striker.
→ Tortle — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Tortle — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tortle — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
